holdings.infoBox: QQQ is an equity ETF with a total of 106 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.63%, Apple at 7.31%, Micron Technology at 4.68%, Microsoft at 4.63%, and Amazon.com at 4.24%.

overview.description: The Invesco QQQ Trust Series I (QQQ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NASDAQ 100 index, a modified-market-cap-weighted index of 100 NASDAQ-listed stocks. QQQ was launched on Mar 10, 1999 and is issued by Invesco.
